chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: In Python programming, we saw for loops.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: But do you know that you can use else with for loop?

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: Today's video is about this.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: Let's go to the computer screen and see how to use the else statement with for loop.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: Let's get started.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: In many interviews, people are trapped.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: They are asked if else can be used with only if.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: Can else be used with for or while loops?

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: The answer is yes.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: So I want to show you a quick demo of this.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: We can use else with for loop.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: The simple thing is that if I write for i in range 5

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: and if I write print i after colon

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: and then I write else and I print

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: sorry no i and I run it.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: If the control is not able to go inside the for loop,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: then it will go inside the else.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: This is the general thing.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: And that's about it.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: If we write i in range 5,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: then it goes from 0 to 4.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: You and everyone in the world know this.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: But after 0, 1, 2, 3, 4,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: the value of i cannot be 5

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: because we know that range works from 0 to n-1.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: So in this case, else will be executed after that.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: If I write here for i in an empty list,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: I gave an empty list.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: There is nothing in it.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: So it is obvious that it will go inside else

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: and it will give me sorry no i.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: So we can use else with for loop.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: So here I have written this thing.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: As you have learned before,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: the else clause is used along with the if statement.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: Else clause is used along with the if statement.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: Python allows the else keyword to be used with the for loops

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: and while loops as well.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: You can use the else keyword with while loops as well.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: The else block appears after the body of the loop.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: The statements in the else block will be executed

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: after all iterations are completed.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: The program exits the loop only after the else block is executed.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: That means if you are running a for loop or a while loop,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: then at the end when all the values are finished,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: then your else will be executed.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: However, I will ask you a question.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: This question is especially for those who think it is very easy.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: If I write here if i equals to equals to 0 break,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: you tell me,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: I will do one thing, I will move the print i up a little.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: If i equals to equals to, let's do one thing,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: let's do 4 and I will arrange it again.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: And I will arrange 6.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: If I am breaking this for loop after 4,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: or if it was a while loop and I would break it,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: then you tell me whether the content inside the else will be executed or not.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: If you think it is easy, then tell me in the comment section below.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: Some of you must be thinking that it is very easy

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: that you can use else with for loop and else with while loop.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: I am pausing for you, you tell me in the comment section below.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: I hope you commented and I will run it and show you.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: The answer is it does not execute.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: So, the meaning of else being executed is that

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: the loop did not break, the loop has ended.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: One more time, the loop did not break, the loop has ended.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: It has ended successfully.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: And its last value has reached there.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: And now it has ended, the last value has been processed,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: the last iteration has been processed.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: That's why the content of else is being printed.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: This was very important here.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: Super important.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: And it is asked in interview questions.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: Many people come to me, they do machine learning in python,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: they do data science, they remember the syntax of pandas,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: where do they get stuck in the end? In else.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: How do you use else with loop?

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: The interviewer asks and the question is that the loop has been broken.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: Tell me whether the content inside else will be printed or not.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: And they get stuck there.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: And it happens.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: If it is not with you, then take care.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: The same thing can be done with while loop.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: If this loop while i is less than 7,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: and I make it i is equal to 0,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: and I make it i plus plus,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: i plus 1,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: it is exactly the same thing.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: Okay?

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: I forgot to put colon.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: And don't forget to put indentation.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: If I do exactly the same thing, then sorry, no i print will not happen.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: And if I don't break it, then what will happen?

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: Then it will be printed.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: So you see, sorry, no i print is done.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: It went from 0 to 6.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: So you have to keep this thing in mind.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: And exactly the same thing I have told you and you have told me.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: And I have used dot format,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: which I told you in the chapter on string formatting.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: Okay?

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: So if you want, you can run this program too.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: And if you run this,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: then you will get to see this.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: Iteration number 1 in for loop,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: and then at the end else block in loop.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: That is, this thing went on.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: When all your iterations of for loop are over.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: And at the end, out of loop,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: which is printed, you can see it.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: Okay?

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: I hope you understood.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: And you will never get stuck with else.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: Whatever kind of loop you get,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: you will never get stuck with else.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: I hope so.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: That's all for now.

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
chunks.text: Guys, if you have not accessed the playlist yet,

chunks.title: for Loop with else in Python
